workflows.name: Click First Link
workflows.description: Find and click the first link on the page
workflows.prompt: Click the first link on the page

workflows.name: Search AI News
workflows.description: Search for 'AI news' on the page and click the first result
workflows.expectedResult: Landed on a page showing AI news content

workflows.name: Fill Contact Form
workflows.description: Locate and fill a contact form on the page
workflows.prompt: Fill the contact form with name 'John Doe' and email 'john@example.com'

workflows.name: Scroll & Read Content
workflows.description: Scroll down the page to read more content
workflows.prompt: Scroll down the page and capture the page state
workflows.expectedResult: Page scrolled down, new elements visible

workflows.name: Login Flow
workflows.description: Navigate to a login page and attempt login (demo only, uses example credentials)
workflows.prompt: Log in with username 'demo' and password 'demo123'
workflows.expectedResult: Logged in or appropriate error message

workflows.name: Extract All Links
workflows.description: Get the page state and list all interactive elements
workflows.prompt: Show me all clickable elements on this page
workflows.expectedResult: List of all interactive elements with positions and selectors
